AptTool 0.8.0-alpha.3
Copyright (C) 2026 pauldotknopf

  install                  Regenerate the image-lock.json, based on the
                           image.json and repositories.json files.

  generate-rootfs          Generate the rootfs.

  man                      Display some helpful information in getting started.

  sync-changelogs          Sync all the changelogs locally.

  debian-security-audit    

  help                     Display more information on a specific command.

  version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
AptTool 0.8.0-alpha.3
Copyright (C) 2026 pauldotknopf

  -d, --directory     The directory to generate the rootfs to.

  -w, --overwrite     Should we ignore (delete) any data that may already be
                      present?

  -r, --run-stage2    Should we automatically chroot into the rootfs to run the
                      stage2 scripts?

  -v, --verbose       Display some useful information, for debugging purposes.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
